originalContent:
SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on January 1, 2024, between:

CLIENT: TechCorp Industries Inc.
Address: 123 Business Ave, San Francisco, CA 94105
Contact: John Smith, CTO

PROVIDER: AI Solutions LLC
Address: 456 Innovation Blvd, Austin, TX 78701
Contact: Sarah Johnson, CEO

1. SERVICES
Provider agrees to deliver AI-powered contract analysis services including:
- Automated contract review and analysis
- Risk assessment and compliance checking
- Financial term extraction and validation
- Real-time processing and reporting

2. FINANCIAL TERMS
Total Contract Value: $1,500,000 USD
Payment Schedule: Monthly payments of $125,000
Payment Terms: Net 30 days
Late Payment Fee: 1.5% per month

3. PERFORMANCE METRICS
- Processing accuracy: 99.5% minimum
- Response time: Under 30 seconds
- Uptime guarantee: 99.9%
- Data security: SOC 2 Type II compliance

4. TERM AND TERMINATION
Effective Date: January 1, 2024
Expiration Date: December 31, 2024
Termination: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice

5. LIABILITY AND INDEMNIFICATION
Provider liability limited to contract value
Mutual indemnification for third-party claims
Professional liability insurance: $5,000,000

6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All AI models and algorithms remain Provider's property
Client data remains Client's property
No transfer of IP rights

7. CONFIDENTIALITY
Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality
Non-disclosure period: 5 years post-termination
Permitted disclosures: Legal requirements only

8. COMPLIANCE AND GOVERNANCE
GDPR compliance required
SOX compliance for financial data
Regular security audits mandatory
Data retention: 7 years

9. FORCE MAJEURE
Neither party liable for delays due to circumstances beyond control
Includes natural disasters, government actions, pandemics

10. GOVERNING LAW
This agreement governed by laws of California
Disputes resolved through binding arbitration
Venue: San Francisco, California

Signatures:
John Smith, CTO - TechCorp Industries Inc.
Sarah Johnson, CEO - AI Solutions LLC

Date: January 1, 2024

factors.description: High contract value increases financial risk

recommendations: Add performance guarantees with specific SLA metrics
Include penalty clauses for service downtime
Consider escrow arrangement for large payments
